title: Company Names Tribunal decision: AXAUK Ltd
body: "Application number 5145  Applicant AXA objected to the name used by AXAUK Ltd under the Companies Act 2006.  This decision was undefended. ‘Undefended’ refers to decisions where there has been no defence in response to the application to the Company Names Tribunal.  Signed order  On the 24 April 2025 the adjudicator hereby gives notice under sections 73(4) and (5) of the Companies Act 2006 that the company name of AXAUK Ltd is changed to 15489207, Ltd. "
